item.label: [PKT-LFC-011](task-0053): Installable Baseline Inventory and Sync-Mode Classification
item.summary: Create installable baseline inventory and classify sync modes

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-011](task-0043): Installable Baseline Inventory and Sync-Mode Classification

## Purpose

Create installable baseline inventory and classify sync modes.

## Scope

- Baseline inventory
- Sync mode classification
- Asset tracking

## Implementation

1. Create inventory
2. Classify sync modes
3. Track assets

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Inventory complete
2. Modes classified
3. Assets tracked
